---
name: Bug report
about: Track a behavior defect with reproducible steps
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the bug and user impact.

## Reproduction

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Observe failure

## Expected behavior

Describe expected result.

## Scope

- Area: backend / frontend / docs / infrastructure
- Risk level: low / medium / high

## Traceability

- Planned branch name: `fix/<issue-id>-short-description`
- Related docs to update:
- Changelog impact: yes / no
